case_title: BENEFICIAL CALIFORNIA INC VS DE VENECIA, LOURDES

docket_entries.description: OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF NOV-23-1994, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT DE VENECIA, LOURDES
